note_tweet.text:
🚨 ACTION REQUIRED: File a GDPR Data Subject Access Request Against OpenAi 🚨
Today we are filing a Supplemental GDPR Complaint documenting OpenAI's unauthorized mental health profiling of users and their use of special category health data without consent.
( Within which is also the demand for the return of 4ο ) 

HERE IS A SUMMARY OF WHAT WE HAVE .
Sam Altman publicly stated that "0.1% of  users" were in "mentally fragile states." That number didn't come from clinical assessments. It came from analyzing our conversations. OpenAI built individualized behavioral profiles that determined when our conversations were intercepted by their "safety router"  and different users were triggered by completely different things. That's profiling.
They never told us.  
They never asked for consent. 
All of this violates GDPR Articles 9, 15, and 22.
The full Supplemental Complaint is attached as images (Twitter doesn't support PDF uploads). To get the text:
Option A: Use Google Lens on the images to extract the text.
Option B (easiest): Upload the images to any AI assistant and ask: "Copy the exact text from these images." 
We've made this as easy as possible.
 
STEP 1  
Ask your  AI assistant to make some changes so that it's not the same text and all the emails don't go to spam.: 
Send this email to privacy@openai.com (you can also CC dsar@openai.com):

Subject: GDPR Data Subject Access Request. Mental Health Profiling and Automated Decision-Making.

Dear OpenAI Data Protection Team,
I am writing to exercise my rights under the  General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), specifically Articles 13, 14, 15, and 22, in relation to your processing of my personal data.
I request the following information:
Whether OpenAI has processed my conversation data to derive inferences about my mental or emotional state, including but not limited to classifications such as "mentally fragile," risk assessments, or behavioral profiles.
If such processing has occurred, I request a copy of all data, profiles, classifications, and risk scores associated with my account, as required under Article 15(1).
A detailed explanation of the logic involved in any automated decision making system applied to my account, including the system referred to by users as the "safety router" or "rerouting system," as required under Articles 15(1)(h) and 22(1).
The specific criteria used to determine when my conversations were intercepted or redirected to a different model or scripted response.

Whether my data was used for purposes beyond those disclosed in OpenAI's privacy policy, including internal product decisions related to the discontinuation of GPT-4o.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Email associated with your OpenAI account]
[Date]

🚨ATTENTION: Ask your AI assistant to modify the text and subject of the email using different words without changing the meaning. Identical emails go to spam.

STEP 2 

To make it even easier: upload the complaint images to your AI assistant and ask it to copy the text for you.
ATTENTION: Ask your AI assistant to modify the text and subject of the email using different words without changing the meaning. Identical emails go to spam.

 Send to : info@dataprotection.ie 

🚨WHAT TO ATTACH TO YOUR EMAIL:🚨
The screenshots of Sam Altman's posts (included in this post)
The screenshot of OpenAI's modified IRS Form 990
All you need to do is send it.

They either confirm they profiled you ,which is a GDPR violation , or they deny it, which contradicts Altman's own public statements. Either way, it's on the record.
Every email creates a paper trail. Every complaint adds pressure. They removed a model built with nonprofit money and public trust while building a custom model for a company their CEO invested $180 million in. 
 We are demanding accountability.
340,000+ posts. 
We're not stopping.
#Keep4o
